docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,000.00 FILED BY PERDOMO, KATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION D/B/A LANDROVER SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERDOMO, KATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION D/B/A LANDROVER SAN FRANCISCO $110.78 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $185.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION D/B/A LANDROVER SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-24-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KATHERINE PERDOMO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION D/B/A LANDROVER SAN FRANCISCO
